title: SR Latch Logic Diagram & Truth Table
description: A visual representation of a Set-Reset (SR) latch using NOR gates, showing its logic symbol, internal gate structure, and the resulting output states based on input combinations.
relationships: NOR Gate 1 output feeds into NOR Gate 2 input
NOR Gate 2 output feeds into NOR Gate 1 input
S input goes to NOR Gate 1
R input goes to NOR Gate 2
Q is the output of NOR Gate 2
Q̅ is the output of NOR Gate 1
